options.name: -hold_folding
options.description: Amount of additional sigma units added on top of the existing nominal hold value

options.name: -libs
options.description: List of library names (not library paths) or collection object

options.name: -nochange_hold_folding
options.description: Amount of additional sigma units added on top of the existing nominal hold value for no-change timing arcs

options.name: -nochange_setup_folding
options.description: Amount of additional sigma units added on top of the existing nominal setup value for no-change timing arcs

options.name: -setup_folding
options.description: Amount of additional sigma units added on top of the existing nominal setup value
